mapper.select: SELECT toi.*, thimH.hr_id as head_hr_id, hrH.hr_nm as head_hr_nm, thimS.hr_id as second_hr_id, sf.file_id as primary_id, sf1.file_id as secondary_id, hrS.hr_nm as second_hr_nm, (select count(t1.hr_id) from esg.tb_hr_info t1 inner join esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map t2 ON t2.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.hr_id =t2.hr_id where t1.orgn_id = toi.orgn_id and t1.use_yn = 'Y') as result_cnt -- 총인원 수 FROM esg.tb_orgn_info toi LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_incharge_map thimH on thimH.target_id = toi.orgn_id AND thimH.target_type = 'orgn' AND thimH.gubun = 'HEAD' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info hrH on hrH.hr_id = thimH.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_incharge_map thimS on thimS.target_id = toi.orgn_id AND thimS.target_type = 'orgn' AND thimS.gubun = '2ND' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info hrS on hrS.hr_id = thimS.hr_id -- 파일 location LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf on sf.target_id = thimH.hr_id and sf.target_type='hrImg' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf1 on sf1.target_id = thimS.hr_id and sf1.target_type='hrImg' WHERE 1=1 AND toi.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY toi.use_yn DESC, toi.ord_seq, toi.orgn_id

SELECT toi.*, thimH.hr_id as head_hr_id, hrH.hr_nm as head_hr_nm, hrH.user_id as id, thimS.hr_id as second_hr_id, hrS.hr_nm as second_hr_nm, hrJ.jbrp_nm, sf.file_id as primary_id, sf1.file_id as secondary_id FROM esg.tb_orgn_info toi LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_incharge_map thimH on thimH.target_id = toi.orgn_id AND thimH.target_type = 'orgn' AND thimH.gubun = 'HEAD' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info hrH on hrH.hr_id = thimH.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_incharge_map thimS on thimS.target_id = toi.orgn_id AND thimS.target_type = 'orgn' AND thimS.gubun = '2ND' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info hrS on hrS.hr_id = thimS.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp hrJ on hrH.jbrp = hrJ.jbrp_id and toi.comp_id = hrJ.comp_id -- 파일 location LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf on sf.target_id = thimH.hr_id and sf.target_type='hrImg' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf1 on sf1.target_id = thimS.hr_id and sf1.target_type='hrImg' WHERE 1=1 AND toi.orgn_id = #{searchText}
mapper.insert:
select to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad( (coalesce(max(substring(orgn_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0' ) as orgn_id from esg.tb_orgn_info where orgn_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%'
INSERT INTO esg.tb_orgn_info ( comp_id, orgn_id, orgn_nm, orgn_desc, ord_seq, created_at, created_by, use_yn ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{orgnId}, #{orgnNm}, #{orgnDesc}, #{ordSeq}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{useYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM esg.tb_orgn_chart toc WHERE toc.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY use_yn desc, created_at desc
mapper.insert:
select to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad( (coalesce(max(substring(chart_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0' ) as chart_id from esg.tb_orgn_chart where chart_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%'
INSERT INTO esg.tb_orgn_chart ( comp_id, chart_id, chart_nm, chart_data, org_count, use_yn, created_at, created_by, chart_blob_data ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{chartId}, #{chartNm}, #{chartData}, #{orgCount}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{chartBlobData} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_orgn_info SET comp_id = #{compId}, orgn_id = #{orgnId}, orgn_nm = #{orgnNm}, orgn_desc = #{orgnDesc}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE orgn_id = #{orgnId}

UPDATE esg.tb_orgn_chart SET comp_id = #{compId}, chart_nm = #{chartNm}, chart_data = #{chartData}, org_count = #{orgCount}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, chart_blob_data = #{chartBlobData} WHERE chart_id = #{chartId}
mapper.select: SELECT toi.comp_id, toi.orgn_id, toi.orgn_nm, toi.orgn_desc, toi.ord_seq, toi.use_yn FROM esg.tb_orgn_info toi WHERE 1=1 AND toi.orgn_id = #{orgnId}

SELECT tom.* , tom.orgn_id as id , toi.orgn_nm as nm FROM esg.tb_orgn_map tom LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi on toi.orgn_id = tom.orgn_id WHERE 1=1 AND tom.target_id = #{targetId} AND tom.target_type = #{targetType}

SELECT tom.* , tom.orgn_id as id , toi.orgn_nm as nm FROM esg.tb_orgn_map tom LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi on toi.orgn_id = tom.orgn_id WHERE 1=1 AND tom.target_id = #{targetId} AND tom.target_type = #{targetType} AND tom.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY tom.orgn_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_orgn_map ( target_type, target_id, orgn_id, created_at, created_by, use_yn ) VALUES ( #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{id}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{useYn} )
